ontology.source_policy: Primary metadata from Steam Store appdetails/store pages; screenshots only identify candidate titles and visible dates.

design_families.cards-and-tabletop: Cards, deck construction, tabletop rules, or competitive card economies.
design_families.systems-and-strategy: Automation, colony, survival, city, or strategic systems with compounding state.
design_families.puzzle-and-narrative: Mystery, puzzle, visual novel, or choice-led interpretation loops.
design_families.vr-and-embodied: VR, rhythm, spatial, or embodied interaction as the central affordance.
design_families.social-and-coop: Cooperation, deduction, party, or communication-first play.
design_families.action-and-adventure: Action, exploration, platforming, shooting, or adventure-first progression.
